headline: A Look At Omnicom Group (OMC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Omnicom Group stock overview Omnicom Group (OMC) is back on investor screens after recent trading, with the stock last closing at US$76.27. The company operates in global advertising and marketing services, with operations across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East & Africa. See our latest analysis for Omnicom Group. At US$76.27, Omnicom Group’s recent 90-day share price return of 12.18% contrasts with a weaker year to date share price return of a 6.21%...
